testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
18:17:40.594 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [pe.gimnasio.sistema_gimnasio.SistemaGimnasioApplicationTests]: SistemaGimnasioApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:17:40.837 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration pe.gimnasio.sistema_gimnasio.SistemaGimnasioApplication for test class pe.gimnasio.sistema_gimnasio.SistemaGimnasioApplicationTests 18:17:41.048 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [pe.gimnasio.sistema_gimnasio.SistemaGimnasioApplicationTests]: SistemaGimnasioApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:17:41.050 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration pe.gimnasio.sistema_gimnasio.SistemaGimnasioApplication for test class pe.gimnasio.sistema_gimnasio.SistemaGimnasioApplicationTests
